desktop_app_join_url.desc: When supplied, available Slack clients will attempt to directly launch the 3rd-party Call with this URL. The Call fields that may be updated are the Call's `title`, `join_url`, and `desktop_app_join_url`.

join_url.desc: The URL required for a client to join the Call. The Call fields that may be updated are the Call's `title`, `join_url`, and `desktop_app_join_url`.

title.desc: The name of the Call. The Call fields that may be updated are the Call's `title`, `join_url`, and `desktop_app_join_url`.
